mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_device_info (mn_num, mn_name, device_brand, device_model, device_quantity, setup_time, lifespan, life_unit) VALUES (#{mnNum}, #{mnName}, #{deviceBrand}, #{deviceModel}, #{deviceQuantity}, #{setupTime}, #{lifespan}, #{lifeUnit}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE device_brand = VALUES(device_brand), mn_name = VALUES(mn_name), device_model = VALUES(device_model), device_quantity = VALUES(device_quantity), setup_time = VALUES(setup_time), lifespan = VALUES(lifespan), life_unit = VALUES(life_unit)
